groupings.title: Start here: improve any AI-built product flow
groupings.description: Use PerfectUX to turn rough AI-generated screens, copy, states, and approval flows into clear, accessible, recoverable product experiences.

groupings.title: For PerfectUX.ai projects and MCP workflows
groupings.description: Use PerfectUX Workspace when the agent needs project context, exports, task artifacts, launch assets, or schema-driven updates from a PerfectUX.ai workspace.
